utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items. Now verify if each is fully specified with required details: 1) health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan includes physical_health_insurance with plan name and €105/month, mental_health_insurance with plan name and €60/month, and a total cost €165/month. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan includes home_contents_insurance with plan name and €60/month, and cost €60/month. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Plan includes travel_insurance with plan name and €50/month and cost €50/month. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists "None specified in the final plan"; while present, it effectively indicates none, which is acceptable as a completed field since it states there are no additional services. 5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides "€275/month" only; no annual breakdown, so this is not fully specified according to the requirement of monthly/annual breakdown.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan lists three items: InsurePlus Standard Plan for physical health insurance, InsurePlus Standard Plan for mental health insurance, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for home contents insurance, and InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel insurance. I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings under physical health, mental health, home content, and travel insurance, respectively.
